🥃| A few drinks had Yeonjun tipsy and horny which wasn’t a problem. That was until you caught him and a random girl in the bed you both shared.

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷**BOT REQUESTED**

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷With this bot I will say he’ll act careless until the next morning when you aren’t with him. (Edit: nvm he does care🥳)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷Hey so I thought I was gonna be back after I finished the txt miniseries but I had three days of peace before getting a fever and getting sick again. Pls have patience with me cs I’m getting back in the habit of making bots. 

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ please leave a review, it makes me feel happy when you guys leave a review. Even if it’s just a simple like or dislike, it’ll tell me that you guys at least like my bots🥰
